author: Dom Smith
content: I’ve never been to a better food stall, if you can even call it that, may as well be a restaurant! The food is really really good, having steak nights and burger night, with loads of options, as well as their extensive normal menu of salads and tacos and cakes and just all the bits and bobs you fancy. The fish tacos were banging, the fish being flakey and flavourful, delightful! We had a couple smoothies too, which were also good, matching the vibes. Honestly 100% worth stopping by, especially as there isn’t too many good places in Hayle, so this should definitely be the top of your list. They even do coffees and pastries if that’s more your thing. They’ve got you covered.
